# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: service-access-control
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/frontend/ns/serviceaccount/frontend-app
        - cluster.local/ns/monitoring/ns/serviceaccount/monitoring-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        paths:
        - /api/v1/users/*
        - /api/v1/products/*
    - operation:
        methods:
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/users/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/admin/ns/serviceaccount/admin-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        paths:
        - /api/v1/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/external/ns/serviceaccount/external-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        paths:
        - /api/v1/public/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/cronjob/ns/serviceaccount/cronjob-app
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - POST
        paths:
        - /api/v1/webhook/*
